pending_tasks.task: 🟢 LOW: Fix final flaky assertion in PythonUpdateCheckerTest (Singleton conflict) - Partially resolved by fixing JSON mock issues
Future: Migrate off Chaquopy to drop 2.5s overhead

recent_changes.description: Migrated to Gemini 2.5 Flash and disabled Thinking mode via root thinkingConfig for faster responses.
Removed thinkingConfig from GeminiResponseHelper to fix HTTP 400 Bad Request error masquerading as QuotaExhausted on Gemini 2.5 Flash.
Implemented Network Security hardening (cleartext traffic disabled) and strict input validation via Regex.
Stabilized PythonUpdateCheckerTest by migrating from org.json to kotlinx.serialization for JVM compatibility.

errors_encountered.error: Method getJSONObject in org.json.JSONObject not mocked (JVM Test error)
errors_encountered.solution: Replaced Android-bounded org.json with pure Kotlin kotlinx.serialization library.
Root cause was HTTP 400 due to invalid 'thinkingConfig' param. Removed the field from GeminiResponseHelper.kt.

decisions_made.reason: Prevent API Key leakage over insecure Wi-Fi channels.

decisions_made.decision: Strict VideoID Filtering at ViewModel level
decisions_made.reason: Reduce unnecessary Python/AI triggers for garbage input, improving UX and resource consumption.
